igbo.read_v_formation_explanation_aloud: Gụpụta nkọwa nhazi V n'olu dara ụda
igbo.v_formation_simulator_canvas_drag_bird: Akwa nkiri nhazi V. Dọrọ nnụnụ iji gbanwee ọnọdụ ha. Eji kpakpando kaa nnụnụ na-eduga. Ogwe ike dị n'elu nnụnụ ọ bụla na-egosi ọkwa ike ya ugbu a. Mkpu akwụkwọ ndụ akwụkwọ ndụ dị n'azụ nnụnụ ọ bụla na-egosi mpaghara ikuku-elu, ebe nnụnụ ndị dị n'azụ na-echekwa ike. Mpaghara uhie dị n'azụ kpọmkwem na-egosi mpaghara ikuku-ala.
igbo.how_v_formation_works: 🪿 Otú Nhazi V si Arụ Ọrụ
igbo.when_a_bird_flaps_its_wings_it_creates: Mgbe nnụnụ na-akụ nku ya, ọ na-emepụta ikuku na-agbagharị na nsọtụ nku ọ bụla. Ikuku dị n'azụ na n'okpuru nsọtụ nku ka a na-akwanye n'ala
igbo.downwash_but_the_air_to_the_side_pushe: (ikuku-ala), mana ikuku dị n'akụkụ ka a na-akwanye n'elu
igbo.by_positioning_themselves_in_the_upwas: Site n'idobe onwe ha na mpaghara ikuku-elu — ihe dị ka 30° n'azụ na n'akụkụ nnụnụ dị n'ihu — nnụnụ ndị dị n'azụ na-enweta nkwado n'efu site na ikuku na-arịgo. N'ìgwè nnụnụ ndị eziokwu nke a na-echekwa ihe dị ka
igbo.the_leader_gets_no_benefit_and_tires_f: Onye ndu anaghị enweta uru ọ bụla ma na-ike ngwa ngwa. Mgbe ike ya dara n'okpuru 30%, ọ na-alaghachi azụ ma nnụnụ ọzọ ewere ndu. A na-akpọ nke a
igbo.in_nature_every_bird_takes_a_turn_at_t: . N'okike nnụnụ ọ bụla na-ewere oge ya n'ihu.
igbo.try_dragging_birds_into_different_posi: Gbalịa ịdọrọ nnụnụ n'ọnọdụ dị iche iche iji hụ otú arụmọrụ nhazi na nchekwa ike si agbanwe! Pịa V ka imepụta na-akpaghị aka, S iji fesaa.
igbo.adjust_the_sliders_to_see_how_distance: Gbanwee ihe mmịfe ka ịhụ otú anya, nha ahụ, ikuku na nhazi si emetụta mkpa ike nnụnụ. Nke a na-eṣe ihe atụ nke ezigbo physics nke mbugharị.
igbo.bird_flight_costs_12x_their_resting_me: Ọfụfe nnụnụ na-efu ihe dị ka ugboro 12 nke ọnụego metabolism izu ike ya (iwu Kleiber). Abụba na-enye 9 kcal kwa gram — mmanụ dị elu kachasị ike na bayoloji. Tupu mbugharị nnụnụ na-abanye
igbo.a_feeding_frenzy_where_they_may_double: — ọgụ nri, ebe ha nwere ike ịbawanye ịdị arọ ahụ ha okpukpu abụọ site na abụba. Bar-tailed Godwit na-ere
igbo.during_its_7_145_mile_non_stop_flight_: n'oge ọfụfe ya nke maịl 7,145 na-akwụsịghị site na Alaska ruo New Zealand.
igbo.this_journey_requires_more_fat_than_th: ⚠️ Njem a chọrọ abụba karịa ịdị arọ nnụnụ! Ọ ga-achọ ebe mgbaju mmanụ — ma ọ bụ nhazi V iji belata mmefu.
igbo.some_birds_migrate_at_extreme_altitude: Ụfọdụ nnụnụ na-akwaga n'ịdị elu dị oke — Bar-headed Geese na-agafe Himalaya na ụkwụ 29,000. Dọrọ ihe mmịfe ka ịhụ otú ọnọdụ si agbanwe.
igbo.bar_headed_geese_survive_here_thanks_t: Bar-headed Geese na-adị ndụ ebe a n'ihi hemoglobin na-ekechi oxygen nke ọma, ngụgụ buru ibu na mitochondria na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma. Ọtụtụ anụmanụ na-enye ara ga-atụfu ọgụgụ isi na ịdị elu a. Ọbara ha nwere mgbanwe hemoglobin pụrụ iche (Pro→Ala na ọnọdụ 119) nke na-abawanye mmasị oxygen na 50%.
igbo.many_songbirds_migrate_at_this_range_w: Ọtụtụ nnụnụ na-abụ abụ na-akwaga n'oke a, ebe ikuku dị mkpa na-ebelata ịdọkpụ mana oxygen dị ntakịrị. Nnụnụ na-akwụ ụgwọ nke a site na iku ume nke ọma karịa: usoro mmegharị ikuku otu ụzọ ha na-ewepụta oxygen mgbe ha na-eku ume na mgbe ha na-ekupụ ume, dị iche na ngụgụ anụmanụ na-enye ara nke na-ewepụta ya naanị mgbe ha na-eku ume.
igbo.most_migrants_fly_between_5_000_15_000: Ọtụtụ ndị na-akwaga na-efe n'etiti ụkwụ 5,000 na 15,000. Okpomọkụ ikuku na-adaba ihe dị ka 3.5 °F kwa ụkwụ 1,000 (mgbada okpomọkụ ọkọlọtọ). Nnụnụ na-ahọrọ ịdị elu iji chọta ikuku dị mma — otu nnụnụ nwere ike ife ụkwụ 2,000 n'otu abalị na ụkwụ 12,000 n'abalị na-esote.
igbo.hummingbirds_and_some_shorebirds_fly_c: Hummingbird na ụfọdụ nnụnụ mmiri na-efe nso n'elu, karịsịa n'elu mmiri. Ife ala dị mma site na icy iji, mana ọ pụtara mgbochi ikuku karịa na nkwado ikuku dị ntakịrị. Mgbe ha na-agafe Ọwụwa Mmiri Mexico maịl 600, ọtụtụ nnụnụ na-efe n'etiti ụkwụ 1,000 na 3,000.
igbo.deflects_wind_upward_on_windward_side: na-atụgharị ikuku n'elu n'akụkụ nke na-eche ikuku ihu
igbo.sea_breeze_thermal_effect: mmetụta okpomọkụ nke ikuku oke osimiri
igbo.add_a_bird_to_ride_the_wind_currents: Tinye nnụnụ ka ọ nọkwasị na mmiri ikuku
igbo.thermals_are_columns_of_rising_warm_ai: Usoro okpomọkụ bụ ogidi ikuku na-ekpo ọkụ na-arịgo nke a na-emepụta mgbe anyanwụ na-ekpo ala ọkụ n'ụzọ na-ezighị ezi. Elu gbara ọchịchịrị (ebe ịdọba ụgbọala, ubi a kọrọ akọ) na-emepụta usoro siri ike karịa elu ndị dị nfe (mmiri, ọhịa). Nnụnụ na-efe efe dị ka egbe na udele na-arịgo na okirikiri na usoro okpomọkụ, na-enweta ịdị elu na-akụghị nku. Mgbe ahụ ha na-amịpụ gaa n'usoro na-esote, na-emepụta “ okporo ụzọ okpomọkụ ”, ụzọ ngwa ngwa nke na-arụ ọrụ nke ọma na mbara igwe.
igbo.when_wind_encounters_a_mountain_it_is_: Mgbe ikuku zutere ugwu, a na-akwanye ya n'elu n'akụkụ mgbada nke na-eche ikuku ihu. Nke a na-emepụta usoro ikuku na-arịgo nke nnụnụ na-efe efe (dị ka egbe ọla edo) na-eji n'elu ugwu. N'akụkụ nke anaghị eche ikuku ihu, ikuku na-emikpu ngwa ngwa, na-emepụta mpaghara “rotor” dị ize ndụ nke ikuku na-akpali na-agbada. Ọ bụ ya mere nnụnụ na ndị ọkwọ ụgbọ elu ji ezere akụkụ ugwu nke anaghị eche ikuku ihu.
igbo.land_heats_faster_than_water_during_th: Ala na-ekpo ọkụ ngwa ngwa karịa mmiri n'ehihie. Ikuku na-ekpo ọkụ na-arịgo n'elu ala ma ikuku jụrụ oyi na-esi n'oke osimiri bịa were ọnọdụ ya, na-emepụta “ikuku oke osimiri” gaa n'ụsọ oké osimiri. N'abalị usoro na-atụgharị. Nnụnụ na-akwaga na-eji ikuku ụsọ osimiri ndị a a pụrụ ịkọ chekwaa ike. Mpaghara njikọ, ebe ikuku oke osimiri na-ezute ikuku ime obodo, na-emepụtakarị usoro okpomọkụ nke nnụnụ na-eji enweta ịdị elu.
igbo.high_altitude_jet_streams_are_narrow_b: Mmiri jet ịdị elu dị elu bụ usoro dị warịị nke ikuku dị oke ọsọ (100-200 mph) na ụkwụ 30,000-40,000. Ọ bụ ezie na ọtụtụ nnụnụ na-efe n'okpuru mmiri jet nke ukwuu, ụfọdụ ndị na-akwaga dị ka Bar-tailed Godwit na-arịgo n'elu ụkwụ 20,000 iji jide ikuku ịdị elu dị elu dị mma. Achọpụtara ọgazị site na radar na ụkwụ 29,000 n'elu Himalaya, ebe oxygen dị ntakịrị na okpomọkụ na-adaba ruo -50 °F.
igbo.wind_shear_is_a_sudden_change_in_wind_: Mbipụ ikuku bụ mgbanwe mberede na ọsọ ma ọ bụ ntụzịaka ikuku n'anya dị mkpụmkpụ. Ọ dị ize ndụ maka nnụnụ na ụgbọ elu. N'oge oké mmiri, obere mgbawa (ogidi mberede nke ikuku na-agbada) na-emepụta mbipụ ikuku siri ike nso n'ala. Nnụnụ na-achọpụta mgbanwe nrụgide ma na-anọkarị ọdụ mbugharị mgbe ihu oké mmiri na-abịaru nso.
igbo.admiral_sir_francis_beaufort_created_h: Admiral Sir Francis Beaufort mepụtara ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ ikuku ya n'afọ 1805 dabere na mmetụta ikuku na ụgbọ mmiri nwere ọkọ. Ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ Beaufort nke oge a na-eji nleba anya ala: ike 0 (dị jụụ) = anwụrụ ọkụ na-arịgo kwụ ọtọ; ike 6 (ikuku siri ike) = alaka buru ibu na-efegharị, nche anwụ na-atụgharị; ike 12 (oké ifufe) = mbibi. Ọtụtụ nnụnụ na-ahọrọ ịkwaga n'ike 2-4 (ikuku dị nro ruo etiti).
igbo.migrants_strongly_prefer_flying_with_t: Ndị na-akwaga na-ahọrọ nke ukwuu ife na ikuku n'azụ ha. Ọbụna ikuku azụ nke 15 mph na-abawanye ọsọ nnụnụ n'ala okpukpu abụọ nke ọma na otu mmefu ike. Ọmụmụ ihe na-egosi mmegharị nnụnụ dị okpukpu 10 karịa n'ụbọchị mbugharị nwere ikuku azụ dị mma karịa n'ụbọchị ikuku ihu.
igbo.albatrosses_exploit_wind_speed_gradien: Albatross na-eji mgbada ọsọ ikuku n'elu ebili mmiri oke osimiri. Site n'ịgbanwe n'etiti ịrịgo n'ime ikuku ọsọ ọsọ na imikpu n'ime ikuku dị nwayọọ nso n'elu, ha na-ewepụta ike site na mbipụ ikuku n'onwe ya. Albatross nwere ike ife maịl kachasị na-akụghị nku nke ukwuu.
igbo.when_wind_hits_a_cliff_face_or_ridge_t: Mgbe ikuku kụrụ ihu nkume ma ọ bụ mgbada, ikuku na-alọghachi na-emepụta “ebili mmiri” nke mbuli n'akụkụ ahịrị mgbada. Nnụnụ na-achụ nta na-efe n'elu usoro mgbada ndị a n'oge mbugharị, na-ejikọ usoro ugwu dị ka ịwụ na nkume. Hawk Mountain na Pennsylvania bụ ihe a ma ama maka ihe omume a.
igbo.experiment_place_a_thermal_and_a_mount: Nnwale: Tinye usoro okpomọkụ na ugwu n'ọhịa, wee tinye nnụnụ. Lelee ya ka ọ na-efe n'elu usoro na-arịgo!
igbo.birds_as_weather_forecasters: 🌦️ Nnụnụ dị ka Ndị na-ebu Amụma Ihu Igwe
igbo.birds_are_exquisitely_sensitive_to_wea: Nnụnụ nwere mmetụta dị ukwuu na mgbanwe ihu igwe ma jiri ha mee ihe dị ka “barometer dị ndụ” n'akụkọ ihe mere eme niile:
igbo.birds_can_detect_changes_in_barometric: Nnụnụ nwere ike ịchọpụta mgbanwe na nrụgide barometric n'ihi ndị nnata pụrụ iche na ntị etiti (akụkụ paratympanic). Mgbe nrụgide dara tupu oké mmiri, nnụnụ na-efekarị ala ma na-eri nri nke ọma karịa. Nnụnụ swallow na-efe ala bụ ihe ngosi oké mmiri ọdịnala.
igbo.some_birds_can_hear_infrasound_below_2: Ụfọdụ nnụnụ nwere ike ịnụ infrasound (n'okpuru 20 Hz) nke a na-emepụta ọbụna site na oké mmiri dị anya, ebili mmiri oke osimiri na ala ọma jijiji. Dị ka ndị mbufe GPS chọpụtara, Golden-winged Warblers hapụrụ Tennessee awa 24 tupu usoro oké ifufe rute na 2014. Ha fere karịa maịl 900 iji zere oké mmiri.
igbo.autumn_migration_is_strongly_correlate: Mbugharị mgbụsị akwụkwọ nwere njikọ siri ike na ngafe nke ihu oyi. Nnụnụ na-efe n'elu ikuku ugwu-ọdịda anyanwụ n'azụ ihu oyi, nke na-enye ma ikuku azụ ma mbara igwe dị ọcha. Ndị na-ekiri nnụnụ nwere ahụmịhe na-enyocha maapụ ihu igwe iji buo amụma abalị kachasị elu nke mbugharị.
igbo.fog_is_dangerous_for_migrating_birds_b: Alụlụ dị ize ndụ maka nnụnụ na-akwaga n'ihi na ọ na-ezochi akara ala na akara nchọgharị mbara igwe. Abalị alụlụ nwere ntọala igwe ojii dị ala na-eweta “ọdịda”, ebe nnụnụ na-akwaga ike gwụrụ na-arịda n'ìgwè na ebe obibi mbụ dị. Ihe omume ndị a, ọ bụ ezie na ọ na-enye nnụnụ nchekasị, na-emepụta ohere nkiri nnụnụ mara mma.
igbo.when_the_swallows_fly_high_the_weather: “Ọ bụrụ na nnụnụ swallow efee elu, ihu igwe ga-akọ. Ọ bụrụ na nnụnụ swallow efee ala, mmiri ozuzo dị n'ụzọ.” — Ilu ọdịnala a bụ n'ezie ziri ezi na sayensị: ụmụ ahụhụ (nri nnụnụ swallow) na-efe elu na usoro nrụgide dị elu na ala tupu oké mmiri.
igbo.light_blue_slow_wind: Acha anụnụ anụnụ dị nfe = ikuku dị nwayọọ
igbo.over_1_million_shorebirds_stop_here_to: Ihe karịrị nde nnụnụ mmiri 1 na-akwụsị ebe a iji rie akwa nshịkọ ịnyịnya
igbo.critical_rest_stop_after_the_500_mile_: Ebe izu ike dị mkpa mgbe ha gafechara Ọwụwa Mmiri Mexico maịl 500
igbo.600_000_sandhill_cranes_gather_here_ea: Sandhill Cranes 600,000 na-ezukọ ebe a n'oge opupu ihe ubi ọ bụla — otu n'ime ihe ngosi kacha mara mma nke okike
igbo.5_million_migratory_birds_depend_on_th: Nde nnụnụ na-akwaga 5 na-adabere na oke osimiri ime obodo a dị ka ebe mgbaju mmanụ
igbo.wetlands_here_support_40_of_north_amer: Ala mmiri ebe a na-akwado 40% nke nnụnụ mmiri na-akwaga nke North America
igbo.largest_estuary_in_the_us_critical_win: Ọnụ mmiri kachasị ukwuu na US — ebe obibi oyi dị mkpa maka ọbọgwụ na ọgazị
igbo.the_four_north_american_flyways: 🗺️ Ụzọ Ọfụfe Anọ nke North America
igbo.migration_timing_varies_dramatically_b: Oge mbugharị na-adịgasị iche nke ukwuu dabere na ụdị:
igbo.early_spring_waterfowl_ducks_geese_hea: Mmalite opupu ihe ubi: Nnụnụ mmiri (ọbọgwụ, ọgazị) na-aga ugwu na-eso mgbaze ice. Red-winged Blackbirds na-alaghachi n'ala mmiri.
igbo.peak_spring_warblers_vireos_tanagers_f: Elu opupu ihe ubi: Warblers, vireos na tanagers na-ejupụta ugwu. Ọtụtụ nnụnụ na-abụ abụ na-akwaga n'abalị. N'abalị kachasị elu enwere ihe karịrị nde nnụnụ 500 na mbara igwe.
igbo.shorebirds_start_south_some_species_fa: Nnụnụ mmiri na-amalite ndịda — ụfọdụ ụdị “dara” n'ebe amụ ma malite ịlaghachi n'oge mbụ Julaị. Ndị okenye na-apụkarị tupu ụmụ nnụnụ.
igbo.peak_fall_raptors_ride_thermals_along_: Elu mgbụsị akwụkwọ: Nnụnụ na-achụ nta na-anọkwasị usoro okpomọkụ n'akụkụ usoro ugwu. Nnụnụ na-abụ abụ na-aga ndịda na-eso ihu oyi. Ọgazị na-efe na nhazi V n'abalị.
igbo.photoperiod_day_length_is_the_primary_: Ogologo ehihie bụ ihe kpatara mbugharị bụ isi. Ka ụbọchị na-adị mkpụmkpụ n'oge mgbụsị akwụkwọ, homonụ na-akpali “Zugunruhe” — enweghị izu ike nke mbugharị — nnụnụ na-amalite ịchịkọta abụba (oke oriri), mgbe ụfọdụ na-eme ka ịdị arọ ahụ mụbaa okpukpu abụọ.
igbo.stopovers_are_not_just_rest_stops_they: Ebe nkwụsị abụghị naanị ebe izu ike, ha bụ
igbo.critical_to_survival_a_migrating_warbl: dị mkpa maka nlanarị. Warbler na-akwaga nwere ike iji 75% nke oge mbugharị n'ebe nkwụsị, na-eri nri dị ka onye ara iji wughachi abụba. Ezigbo ebe obibi nkwụsị nwere ike ịbụ ọdịiche n'etiti ndụ na ọnwụ.
igbo.at_delaware_bay_over_1_million_shorebi: Na Delaware Bay, ihe karịrị nde nnụnụ mmiri 1 (Red Knots, Ruddy Turnstones, Sanderlings) na-adabere na akwa nshịkọ ịnyịnya nke ha yiri na Mee. Oge ga-adịrịrị zuru oke: nnụnụ na-abịa kpọmkwem n'oge nshịkọ ịnyịnya na-eyi akwa. Ọ bụrụ na ọnụ ọgụgụ nshịkọ ịnyịnya adaa (n'ihi ịkụ azụ oke maka mbọ), agbụ mbugharị dum na-adaru.
igbo.conservation_success_story_after_horse: Akụkọ ihe ịga nke ọma nchekwa: Mgbe e webatara oke owuwe ihe ubi nshịkọ ịnyịnya na 2012, ọnụ ọgụgụ Red Knot malitere ịgbake nwayọọ nwayọọ site na obere nsogbu nke 15,000 ruo karịa 50,000 ka ọ na-erule 2025.
igbo.migration_is_one_of_the_most_physicall: Mbugharị bụ otu n'ime ọrụ kachasị chọọ ike n'ahụ n'alaeze anụmanụ. Nnụnụ na-agafe mgbanwe ahụ dị ịtụnanya tupu ha apụọ:
igbo.before_migration_birds_enter_a_feeding: Tupu mbugharị, nnụnụ na-abanye n'ọgụ nri a na-akpọ oke oriri, na-eri nri n'ọnụego okpukpu 2-3 karịa nke nkịtị. Blackpoll Warbler (gram 12) na-atụkwasị abụba nke gram 8-12, na-eme ka ịdị arọ ahụ mụbaa ihe fọrọ nke nta okpukpu abụọ. Abụba a bụ mmanụ maka ọfụfe na-akwụsịghị karịa maịl 2,000.
igbo.to_reduce_weight_migrating_birds_actua: Iji belata ịdị arọ, nnụnụ na-akwaga na-ebelata akụkụ mgbari nri (afọ, imeju, akpa nri) ruo 40% tupu ọpụpụ. Mgbe ha rutere n'ebe nkwụsị, ha na-ewughachi akụkụ ndị a ngwa ngwa iji gbaju mmanụ. “Mgbanwe phenotype” a pụrụ iche n'etiti anụmanụ nwere ọkpụkpụ azụ.
igbo.high_altitude_migrants_like_bar_headed: Ndị na-akwaga ịdị elu dị elu dị ka Bar-headed Geese (na-efe ụkwụ 29,000 n'elu Himalaya) nwere hemoglobin pụrụ iche nwere mmasị karịa maka oxygen. Akwara ha nwere myoglobin ọzọ, na njupụta capillary ha okpukpu abụọ nke ụdị ala dị ala.
igbo.some_birds_can_sleep_while_flying_usin: Ụfọdụ nnụnụ nwere ike ịrahụ ụra ka ha na-efe, na-eji “ụra ọkara isi” — na-emechi otu ọkara isi n'otu oge. E dekọrọ Frigatebirds ka ha na-arahụ ụra nkeji 42 kwa ụbọchị n'oge ọfụfe ụbọchị 10 nke ịgafe oke osimiri, na-ewere obere ụra nke sekọnd 12 nke ọ bụla.
igbo.birds_maintain_an_internal_circadian_c: Nnụnụ na-edobe elekere circadian dị n'ime nke nwere izi ezi dị ịtụnanya. Elekere a na-akwụ ụgwọ mmegharị anyanwụ na mbara igwe (kompas anyanwụ e mezigharịrị oge) ma na-eso mgbanwe oge nke ogologo ehihie nke na-akpali homonụ mbugharị.
igbo.zugunruhe_migration_restlessness_is_a_: Zugunruhe (“enweghị izu ike nke mbugharị”) bụ ọnọdụ omume ebe nnụnụ na-akwaga a kpọchiri n'ọnyà na-akụ nku n'ntụzịaka nke ha ga-akwaga n'ụzọ okike, n'oge ha ga-akwaga. Ọ bụ nke homonụ na-akpali ma e depụta ya na mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa. Ọbụna nnụnụ e ji aka zụlite nke na-enweghị ahụmịhe mbugharị na-egosi Zugunruhe.
igbo.distances_are_approximate_annual_migra: Anya bụ ihe dị ka anya mbugharị kwa afọ. Ọsọ bụ ọsọ njem nkịtị. Ịdị elu bụ ịdị elu mbugharị nkịtị.
igbo.how_scientists_track_migration: 📡 Otú Ndị Sayensị si Eso Mbugharị
igbo.our_understanding_of_migration_has_bee: Nghọta anyị nke mbugharị agbanweela site na teknụzụ:
igbo.since_1920_over_80_million_birds_have_: Kemgbe 1920, e kpụla ihe karịrị nde nnụnụ 80 ihe na North America. Ihe ọ bụla nwere nọmba pụrụ iche. Mgbe ejidere nnụnụ e kpụrụ ihe ọzọ, ndị sayensị na-amụta banyere nlanarị, ụzọ na oge. Ọnụego mgbake dị ala (1-5%), mana data buru ibu nke ukwuu.
igbo.solar_powered_gps_tags_now_as_small_as: Akara GPS nke anyanwụ na-enye ike (ugbu a dị obere dị ka gram 1) na-eziga data ọnọdụ site na satịlaịtị. Ha na-ekpughe ụzọ ziri ezi, oge nkwụsị na ịdị elu ọfụfe. E ji GPS soro ọfụfe Godwit nke maịl 7,145 na-akwụsịghị.
igbo.light_level_geolocators_0_5g_record_su: Ndị na-achọpụta ọnọdụ ọkwa ìhè (gram 0.5) na-edekọ oge ọwụwa anyanwụ na ọdịda anyanwụ. Mgbe ejidere nnụnụ ọzọ, ndị sayensị na-ewepụta data ma gbakọọ latitude (site na ogologo ehihie) na longitude (site na oge etiti ehihie anyanwụ). Izi ezi: ~200 km.
igbo.nexrad_weather_radar_stations_across_t: Ebe radar ihu igwe NEXRAD gafee US na-achọpụta ìgwè nnụnụ na-akwaga buru ibu. BirdCast (Cornell Lab) na-eji mmụta igwe iji buo amụma ma gosi mbugharị n'oge dị adị site na data radar. N'abalị kachasị elu, radar na-egosi ntụpọ akwụkwọ ndụ buru ibu nke mbugharị nnụnụ.
igbo.citizen_scientists_submit_100_million_: Ndị sayensị obodo na-enyefe ihe karịrị nde nleba anya nnụnụ 100 kwa afọ site na eBird, na-emepụta nchekwa data ọdịdị iche iche kachasị ukwuu n'ụwa. Data a na-ekpughe usoro oge na nkesa mbugharị nke ọkwa kọntinent nke ọ nweghị otu ndị nnyocha nwere ike ịnakọta naanị ha.
igbo.a_network_of_1_500_automated_radio_tel: Netwọk nke ihe karịrị ebe 1,500 nke telemetry redio akpaghị aka gafee kọntinent America na-achọpụta nnụnụ e kpụrụ akara ka ha na-efe. Ebe ọ bụla na-ege ntị na ụda redio pụrụ iche, na-emepụta netwọk nchọpụta nke ọkwa kọntinent. A na-achọpụta nnụnụ e kpụrụ akara nke na-efe site na Canada ruo Brazil site na ọtụtụ ebe n'ụzọ.
igbo.as_air_speeds_up_its_pressure_drops_a_: Ka ikuku na-agba ọsọ, nrụgide ya na-adaba. Elu nku dị elu gbagọrọ agbagọ na-amanye ikuku ka ọ na-asọ ọsọ n'elu karịa n'okpuru. Nke a na-emepụta
igbo.as_the_angle_of_attack_increases_lift_: Ka akụkụ mbuso agha na-abawanye, mbuli na-abawanye — ruo otu ebe.
igbo.stall_angle_airflow_separates_from_the: (akụkụ ịkwụsị) gafere, mmegharị ikuku na-ekewa site n'elu dị elu. Nku na-atụfu mmegharị ikuku dị nro, mbuli na-adaba nke ukwuu, ịdọkpụ na-awụlikwa. Nke a bụ “ịkwụsị”.
igbo.l_d_measures_aerodynamic_efficiency_a_: L/D na-atụ arụmọrụ aerodynamic. L/D dị elu pụtara mbuli karịa n'otu nkeji ịdọkpụ. Albatross na-enweta nha L/D nke usoro
igbo.meaning_20_pounds_of_lift_for_every_1_: (nke pụtara paụndụ 20 nke mbuli maka paụndụ 1 nke ịdọkpụ), otu n'ime nke kachasị mma n'okike. Gliders nke oge a
igbo.induced_vs_parasite_drag: Ịdọkpụ e Mepụtara vs Ịdọkpụ Parasite
igbo.is_a_byproduct_of_creating_lift_the_wi: bụ ihe si na imepụta mbuli: ikuku nsọtụ nku nke nnụnụ na-eji na nhazi V. Ọ na-ebelata na ọsọ.
igbo.comes_from_the_bird_s_body_pushing_thr: na-esi na ahụ nnụnụ na-akwanye site na ikuku; ọ na-abawanye na square nke ọsọ. N'ebe usoro abụọ a na-ezukọ enwere
igbo.the_most_efficient_cruising_speed: — ọsọ njem kacha arụ ọrụ nke ọma.
igbo.bird_flight_operates_at_reynolds_numbe: Ọfụfe nnụnụ na-arụ ọrụ na nọmba Reynolds n'etiti 10,000 na 500,000 — usoro aerodynamic siri ike. N'ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ ndị a oyi nsọtụ (ntakịrị ikuku rapaara n'elu nku) bụ akụkụ laminar, akụkụ na-akpali. Abụba nnụnụ na-emepụta obere mkpọtụ nke n'ezie
igbo.maintain_airflow_attachment_especially: na-edobe njikọ mmegharị ikuku, karịsịa n'akụkụ mbuso agha buru ibu. Nke a bụ ihe ndị injinia ka na-agbalị imepụtaghachi na nhazi drone.
igbo.bird_flight_has_inspired_countless_eng: Ọfụfe nnụnụ akpaliela ọtụtụ ihe ọhụrụ injinịa a na-apụghị ịgụta ọnụ:
igbo.the_upturned_wingtips_on_modern_airlin: Nsọtụ nku e tụgharịrị n'elu na ụgbọ elu njem nke oge a (Boeing 737 MAX, Airbus A350) ka abụba nsọtụ e kewara nke egbe kpaliri kpọmkwem. “Winglets” ndị a na-ebelata ịdọkpụ e mepụtara na 5-7%, na-echekwara ụlọ ọrụ ụgbọ elu ọtụtụ ijeri mmefu mmanụ kwa afọ. Ha na-arụ ọrụ site n'ịgbaji ikuku nsọtụ nku.
igbo.owl_quiet_fans: Fan Ndị Dị Jụụ dị ka nke Ikwiikwii
igbo.owl_feathers_have_a_serrated_leading_e: Abụba ikwiikwii nwere nsọtụ ihu nwere ezé, nhazi elu dị ka velvet, na nsọtụ azụ nwere ihe ncha, nke ọnụ na-ebelata mkpọtụ aerodynamic ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ jụụ. Ndị injinia na GE na Dyson ṅomiri njiri ndị a na blades turbine na nhazi fan, na-ebelata mkpọtụ karịa decibels 10.
igbo.kingfisher_bullet_trains: Ụgbọ Oloko Mgbọ nke Kingfisher Kpaliri
igbo.the_shinkansen_bullet_train_s_nose_was: E mezigharịrị imi ụgbọ oloko mgbọ Shinkansen mgbe injinia na-ekiri nnụnụ Eiji Nakatsu hụrụ ka kingfisher na-amiba site n'ikuku ruo na mmiri na-enweghị ịgba mmiri. Imi nwere ọdịdị ọnụ kingfisher belatara mgbawa ụda na 30% na iji ọkụ eletriki na 15% ka ụgbọ oloko na-apụ site n'ọwara.
igbo.birds_continuously_adjust_wing_shape_a: Nnụnụ na-agbanwe ọdịdị nku, akụkụ na ọnọdụ abụba mgbe niile ka ha na-efe — nke ọma karịa ụgbọ elu ọ bụla. NASA na MIT na-emepụta teknụzụ “nku na-agbanwe ọdịdị” nke na-eji ihe ndị dị mfe na actuators iji ṅomie nhazigharị nku nnụnụ, ikekwe na-eme ka arụmọrụ dịkwuo mma na 8-12%.
igbo.a_bird_feather_is_one_of_the_most_comp: Abụba nnụnụ bụ otu n'ime ihe owuwu kachasị mgbagwoju anya n'okike. Abụba ọfụfe nwere:
igbo.the_central_shaft_a_hollow_tube_strong: Osisi etiti — tube tọgbọ chakoo, siri ike karịa nchara na nha ịdị arọ, e ji beta-keratin mee.
igbo.hundreds_of_branches_growing_from_the_: Ọtụtụ narị alaka na-eto site n'osisi, na-emepụta akwụkwọ abụba.
igbo.tiny_hook_like_structures_connecting_b: Obere ihe owuwu dị ka nko na-ejikọ alaka dị ka velcro. Otu abụba nduru nwere ihe dị ka nde obere nko 1.
igbo.microscopic_hooks_on_barbules_that_zip: Obere nko microscopic na barbules nke na-ejikọ alaka dị ka zip, na-emepụta elu na-adịghị ekwe ikuku. Mgbe abụba fesara, nnụnụ nwere ike iji ọnụ ya bọọ ya ma “zip” ya ọzọ.
igbo.flight_feathers_are_asymmetric_the_lea: Abụba ọfụfe adịghị nhata — akwụkwọ nsọtụ ihu dị warịị karịa nsọtụ azụ. Enweghị nhata a na-emepụta ọdịdị airfoil gbagọrọ agbagọ nke na-emepụta mbuli, dị ka nku ụgbọ elu. Abụba bụ isi na nsọtụ nku na-atụgharị n'oge ọkụ-ala, na-arụ ọrụ dị ka blades propeller n'otu n'otu.
igbo.birds_have_1_000_25_000_feathers_a_swa: Nnụnụ nwere abụba 1,000 ruo 25,000 (swan nwere nke kachasị). Ha na-agbanwe abụba ọfụfe ha niile kwa afọ n'oge
igbo.typically_after_breeding_season_and_be: , na-abụkarị mgbe oge amụmụ gasịrị na tupu mbugharị. Ịtụfu ọtụtụ abụba n'otu oge nwere ike ime ka nnụnụ ghara ife, ya mere ntụpọ abụba na-eso nhata akụkụ abụọ ziri ezi: a na-agbanwe abụba dabara na nku ọ bụla n'otu oge.
igbo.consider_a_ruby_throated_hummingbird_c: Tụlee Ruby-throated Hummingbird ka ọ na-agafe Ọwụwa Mmiri Mexico (maịl 500 na-akwụsịghị):
igbo.pre_flight_fat_2g_57_body_weight: Abụba tupu ọfụfe: +gram 2 (57% nke ịdị arọ ahụ!)
igbo.that_is_an_incredibly_thin_margin_a_st: Nke ahụ bụ oke dị warịị nke ukwuu. Ikuku ihu siri ike, ihu oyi, ma ọ bụ irute ụsọ oké osimiri na ụkọ ịdị arọ nke 10% nwere ike ịbụ ọnwụ. Ọ bụ ya mere ogo ebe obibi nkwụsị bụ
igbo.literally_life_or_death: okwu ndụ ma ọ bụ ọnwụ n'ụzọ nkịtị
igbo.animated_night_sky_showing_nocturnal_b: Mbara igwe abalị na-emegharị na-egosi mbugharị nnụnụ abalị. Kpakpando na-enwu gburugburu Kpakpando Ugwu, ahịrị ubi magnetik na-agbagọ na mbara igwe, otu obere ìgwè na-akwaga site na ihe nkiri. Ọ na-egosi otú nnụnụ si eji kpakpando na mmetụta magnetik maka nchọgharị abalị.
igbo.start_the_navigate_your_flock_challeng: Malite ihe ịma aka “Duzie Ìgwè Nnụnụ Gị”
igbo.guide_a_flock_of_canada_geese_from_the: Duzie ìgwè Canada Geese site n'ebe amụmụ ha n'ugwu Canada ruo ebe obibi oyi ha na South America. Mee mkpebi banyere ihu igwe, ebe izu ike na ụzọ. Ị nwere ike iburu ìgwè ahụ n'ụlọ n'enweghị nsogbu?
igbo.try_the_migration_challenge_again: Nwaa ihe ịma aka mbugharị ọzọ
igbo.migratory_birds_face_growing_dangers_u: Nnụnụ na-akwaga na-eche ihe ize ndụ na-eto eto ihu. Ịghọta ihe egwu ndị a bụ nzọụkwụ mbụ gaa na nchekwa.
igbo.turn_off_unnecessary_lights_during_spr: Gbanyụọ ọkụ na-adịghị mkpa n'oge mbugharị opupu ihe ubi na mgbụsị akwụkwọ (Machị-Mee, Ọgọst-Nọvemba). Ọbụna otu ụlọ gbara ọchịchịrị nwere ike ịzọpụta ọtụtụ narị nnụnụ n'abalị.
igbo.apply_bird_safe_decals_to_windows_bird: Tinye akara nchekwa nnụnụ na windo. Nnụnụ na-ahụ onyinyo mbara igwe na osisi na iko, ọ bụghị iko n'onwe ya. Akara etinyere na anya cm 5 na-agbaji onyinyo.
igbo.plant_native_trees_and_shrubs_that_pro: Kụọ osisi na ahịhịa obodo na-emepụta mkpụrụ osisi ma na-adọta ụmụ ahụhụ — mmanụ dị mkpa maka nnụnụ na-akwaga. Osisi ndị na-abụghị obodo anaghị enwekarị ụmụ ahụhụ nnụnụ chọrọ.
igbo.indoor_cats_live_longer_healthier_live: Nwamba ime ụlọ na-adị ndụ ogologo, ahụ ike ka mma ma na-azọpụta nnụnụ. Onye ọ bụla na-emeri.
igbo.use_apps_like_ebird_cornell_lab_to_rep: Jiri ngwa dị ka eBird (Cornell Lab) kọọ nleba anya nnụnụ. Data gị na-enyere ndị sayensị aka iso oge mbugharị na usoro ọnụ ọgụgụ mmadụ.
igbo.advocate_for_wetland_protection_and_re: Kwuo maka nchekwa ala mmiri na ntinye ike ikuku nke nwere ọrụ na obodo gị.
igbo.are_in_the_air_over_north_america_simu: nọ n'ikuku n'elu North America n'otu oge. Ebe radar ihu igwe na-achọpụta igwe ojii buru ibu nke nnụnụ na-akwaga ka ha na-efe na ọdịda anyanwụ. Ị nwere ike ilele mbugharị n'oge dị adị na BirdCast (birdcast.info).
igbo.most_songbird_migration_happens_at_nig: Ọtụtụ mbugharị nnụnụ na-abụ abụ na-eme n'abalị, mgbe ikuku dị jụụ, ndị na-achụ nta dị ntakịrị, kpakpando na-egosipụta maka nchọgharị. Nnụnụ na-eji
igbo.of_birds_may_work_through_quantum_mech: nke nnụnụ nwere ike ịrụ ọrụ site na quantum mechanics. Protein cryptochrome dị n'anya nnụnụ nwere ike iji njikọ quantum chọpụta ubi magnetik nke Ụwa — na-eme ka nchọgharị nnụnụ bụrụ otu n'ime usoro ndụ ole na ole na-adabere na physics quantum.
igbo.some_bird_species_can_detect_the: Ụfọdụ ụdị nnụnụ nwere ike ịchọpụta
igbo.of_sunlight_even_through_heavy_cloud_c: nke ìhè anyanwụ ọbụna site na igwe ojii dị arọ, na-eji cones pụrụ iche nwere mmetụta UV na retina ha. Nke a pụtara ọbụna n'ụbọchị igwe ojii nnụnụ nwere ike ịchọpụta ọnọdụ anyanwụ ma dobe ụzọ ha.
igbo.the_brain_s_memory_center_is_significa: (ebe ncheta nke ụbụrụ) buru ibu nke ukwuu na ụdị nnụnụ na-akwaga karịa ụdị ndị na-adịghị akwaga. Ọ na-eto n'ezie n'oge mbugharị, na-agbakwụnye neurons ọhụrụ n'usoro a na-akpọ neurogenesis okenye. Ọ na-ebelatakwa ọzọ mgbe mbugharị gasịrị. Mgbanwe oge ụbụrụ a bụ ngalaba dị mkpa nke sayensị akwara.
igbo.back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Laghachi na ndepụta ngwaọrụ STEM Lab
igbo.migration_wind_lab_sections: Akụkụ Ụlọ Nnwale Mbugharị na Ikuku
igbo.energy_budget_50_of_distance_bird_woul: Mmefu ike < 50% nke anya — nnụnụ ga-agụ agụụ nwụọ n'ọkara ụzọ. Nkwụsị bụ iwu.
igbo.energy_budget_near_distance_possible_w: Mmefu ike nso na anya — o kwe omume site na ikuku azụ zuru oke, ma ọ bụghị ya nkwụsị bụ iwu.
igbo.single_leg_flight_realistic_but_tight_: Ọfụfe otu ụkwụ bụ eziokwu mana ọ siri ike. Ọtụtụ ụdị na-agbaju mmanụ n'ọkara ụzọ ọ bụna.
igbo.distance_is_well_within_energy_budget_: Anya dị nke ọma n'ime mmefu ike. Ntachi obi klas Bar-tailed Godwit.
igbo.3_reserve_either_short_distance_or_ove: Nchekwa 3× ma ọ bụ karịa. Ma ọ bụ anya dị mkpụmkpụ ma ọ bụ nchekwa abụba ọzọ.
igbo.energy_inquiry_can_the_bird_make_it: 🔬 Nnyocha Ike — Nnụnụ Nwere Ike Ime Ya?
igbo.pick_wingspan_mass_headwind_formation_: Họrọ obosara nku, ịdị arọ, ikuku ihu, nhazi na anya. Buo amụma ọnọdụ ike. Enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe.
igbo.your_hypothesis_which_parameter_forces: Echiche gị (kedu parameter na-amanye nkwụsị kachasị?)
igbo.e_g_v_formation_savings_only_pay_off_a: d.ọ. Nchekwa nhazi V na-akwụ ụgwọ naanị karịa km 1,500, n'ihi na mmefu ọfụfe na-achị...
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Arapaghị m — Gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.why_would_a_heavier_bird_necessarily_n: Gịnị mere nnụnụ dị arọ ga-eji chọọ ike ọzọ kwa km — kedu ihe nke a nwere na ịdọkpụ?
igbo.a_10_m_s_headwind_doubles_the_work_wha: Ikuku ihu 10 m/s na-eme ọrụ okpukpu abụọ — gịnị ga-eme ma ọ bụrụ na ọkara njem nwere ikuku azụ 10 m/s?
igbo.why_is_v_formation_savings_about_22_wh: Gịnị mere nchekwa nhazi V ji dị ihe dị ka 22%? Kedu ọnụ ahịa ya nye nnụnụ na-eduga?
igbo.how_does_a_hummingbird_4_g_1500_km_gul: Kedu ka hummingbird (gram 4, ịgafe Ọwụwa Mmiri Mexico km 1,500) si adị ndụ site na mbugharị ya?
igbo.i_can_explain_why_this_profile_yields_: Enwere m ike ịkọwa ihe mere profaịlụ a ji enye ọnọdụ ike a.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget nnyocha — enweghị akara, enweghị nkpughe, enweghị idei mmiri azịza. Ihe atụ ike bụ ihe atụ (ịdọkpụ ∝ m^0.67 / obosara nku). Nchekwa nhazi V na-adịgasị iche ~10 ruo 30% dabere na ụdị na ọnọdụ (Lissaman & Shollenberger 1970, oke elu echiche; nha na ọfụfe gụnyere Weimerskirch et al. 2001 na pelican na Portugal et al. 2014 na ibis). Widget na-eji 22% dị ka atụmatụ etiti. Maka ezigbo gburugburu ebe obibi nkwụsị, lelee akwụkwọ mbụ isi.
igbo.trailing_birds_catch_the_upwash_from_t: Nnụnụ ndị na-eso na-ejide ikuku-elu site na nnụnụ dị n'ihu — nchekwa ike 20-30%. Ọnọdụ ndu na-atụgharị n'ihi na nnụnụ dị n'ihu na-arụ ọrụ kachasị.
igbo.birds_read_pressure_gradients_we_canno: Nnụnụ na-agụ mgbada nrụgide nke anyị enweghị ike ịmata. Ikuku-elu, usoro mgbada na ogidi okpomọkụ bụ ụzọ nnụnụ na-achụ nta si efe ọtụtụ narị maịl na-ere ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ kalori efu.
igbo.four_major_north_american_flyways_paci: Ụzọ ọfụfe anọ bụ isi nke North America (Pacific, Etiti, Mississippi, Atlantic) na-eduzi ọtụtụ ijeri nnụnụ ugboro abụọ kwa afọ. Maine dị n'elu ụzọ ọfụfe Atlantic.
igbo.aerodynamics_of_bird_flight: Sayensị Mmegharị Ikuku nke Ọfụfe Nnụnụ
igbo.wing_shape_aspect_ratio_camber_tunes_l: Ọdịdị nku (nha akụkụ + mgbagọ) na-edozi mbuli n'ihe metụtara ịdọkpụ. Nnụnụ na-efe efe = nha akụkụ dị elu, ọkụ nku dị nwayọọ. Hummingbirds = nha akụkụ dị ala, ọkụ nku karịa 60 Hz.
igbo.birds_use_multiple_cues_simultaneously: Nnụnụ na-eji ọtụtụ akara n'otu oge — kompas anyanwụ, ubi magnetik site na cryptochrome n'anya, usoro kpakpando na akara ala mụtara. Ha siri ike megide mfu nke akara ọ bụla.
igbo.v_formation_wind_currents_flyways_aero: Nhazi V • Mmiri Ikuku • Ụzọ Ọfụfe • Sayensị Mmegharị Ikuku • Nchọgharị
